headline: Does Raised 2026 Guidance and CAO Exit Reshape the Bull Case For Cardinal Health (CAH)?
summary: In March 2026, Cardinal Health announced that Chief Accounting Officer Mary Scherer plans to retire in February 2027, with a successor to be identified and onboarded to enable a smooth transition. Her planned departure comes as the company raises its fiscal 2026 earnings guidance and emphasizes growth in its pharmaceutical and specialty platforms, putting extra focus on how leadership continuity supports execution. We’ll now examine how Cardinal Health’s upgraded 2026 earnings guidance and...

headline: Defense IPO Leads Five Stocks To Watch As Iran War Pressures Market
summary: Defense plays Karman Holdings and General Dynamics are among five stocks to watch as the Iran war drives stock market action.
